title: Mining Helmet (Now Dyable)
description: A Mining Helmet that emits light to assist travelling through caves
body:
# 📝About

### Running out of torches easily? Finding yourself lost in caves?
This mining helmet will prevent that. The helmet features a light source that removes the need for torches, provides better visibility for the player and frees your offhand slot for a shield or totem of undying.

## 🛠️Recipe (Any order)
![Mining Helmet Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a4911118e767b310784e778f623b1dfaacaef41.png)

## ✅Recent Updates
- Ability to dye the Mining Helmet

## 🚀Future Updates
- Finding Mining Helmets in certain chests
- Trinkets support

## 🔗Dependencies
This mod makes use of [GeckoLib 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights).

## 🌟Other
This mod is inspired by a few other similar mods which don't have support for 1.20. This is currently the only Mining Helmet mod for fabric that does.
